name: SBM Bank Paisabazaar Paisa+ Credit Card

rewards.displayRate: 1.5% cashback on online spends (for FDs above ₹10,000; 1% for FDs below ₹10,000)
1% cashback on eligible UPI transactions of ₹2,000 and above

additionalBenefits: Earn FD interest rate up to 7% per annum on the linked fixed deposit
100% guaranteed approval with no credit score or income proof required
Build or improve your credit history by making timely card payments
additionalDetails: Cashback is credited as Cash Points where 1 Cash Point = Rs 1
Minimum transaction value of Rs 2,000 is required for UPI spends to earn cashback
A combined daily cap of 500 Cash Points and monthly cap of 3,000 Cash Points applies on cashback accrual
Minimum redemption threshold of 500 Cash Points applies
Accumulated Cash Points expire 1 year from the date of earning

Late Payment Charges: Nil for due < Rs 100, Rs 100 for due Rs 100-500, Rs 500 for due Rs 501-5,000, Rs 600 for due Rs 5,001-10,000, Rs 750 for due Rs 10,001-25,000, Rs 950 for due Rs 25,001-50,000, Rs 1,000 for due > Rs 50,000
internalNotes: Card details manually reviewed and verified by user on 2026-06-18
Secured credit card issued against a Fixed Deposit (minimum Rs 2,000). Credit limit is 90% of the FD amount.
Interest rate of 3.5% per month (42% per annum) applies.
UPI spends under Rs 2,000 are not eligible for cashback.
